message:
Add built-in functions and method call support to native codegen

Agent 1: Wire up methods module
- Import methods.zig in main.zig
- Detect method calls via call.func.* == .attribute
- Route split() and append() to methods module

Agent 2: Implement range/enumerate/zip in builtins.zig
- Document range() handled by genRangeLoop in for-loops
- Add genEnumerate() with compile error placeholder
- Add genZip() with compile error placeholder

Agent 3: Implement split/append in methods.zig
- genSplit() generates std.mem.split(u8, obj, sep)
- genAppend() compile error placeholder (ArrayList needed)

All changes tested: make build passes
